reasoning_chain_text: 1. Filter to December 12-month-ending drug overdose death counts across U.S. states, excluding the national aggregate, sum annual totals needed for year-over-year growth, compute each 2016 through 2023 growth-amplified overdose burden score, and return the year with the highest score.
original_final_question: For each year from 2016 through 2023, compute a growth-amplified overdose burden score as annual drug overdose deaths across all U.S. states multiplied by (1 + year-over-year growth rate). Which year has the highest score? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Sum the December rolling 12-month overdose death totals across all U.S. states for each year, compute year-over-year growth in that total, then score each year from 2016-2023 as total x (1 + max(growth, 0)). The highest growth-amplified score occurs in 2021.
